scripts.build: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm --workspace @agent-foundry/shared run build && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm --workspace @agent-foundry/core run build && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm --workspace @agent-foundry/api run build && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm --workspace @agent-foundry/workbench run build
scripts.typecheck: bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm --workspace @agent-foundry/shared run typecheck && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm --workspace @agent-foundry/core run typecheck && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm --workspace @agent-foundry/api run typecheck && bash scripts/with-node20.sh npm --workspace @agent-foundry/workbench run typecheck
